blended.narrative: Catamount is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,990 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 48°F.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
